song.title: Turn Your Eyes Upon Jesus
song.copyright: 1922 Renewal 1950 by H. H. Lemmel Assigned to Singspiration, Inc.
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C F 1) O soul, are you weary and troubled? . G C No light in the darkness you see? . Am C There's light for a look at the Savior, . C G D G And life more abundant and free.
[C] .C G Am Am/G Chorus Turn your eyes upon Je_sus. . F G Look full in His wonderful face, . C Am F Fm And the things of earth will grow strangely dim, . C G C In the light of His glory and grace.
[V2] 2) Through death into life everlasting He passed, and we follow Him there; O'er us sin no more hath dominion For more than conqu'rors we are!
[V3] 3) His Word shall not fail you, He promised; Believe Him and all will be well; Then go to a world that is dying, His perfect salvation to tell!
